title: Show HN: Satellite imagery object detection using text prompts
full_text:
Satellite Analysis Workspace Demo
 

Welcome to the Satellite Analysis Workspace Demo. This interactive environment allows you to experience the power of our geospatial computer vision models without creating an account or providing any credentials.
 
 

What You Can Do in the Demo
 

In this restricted demo environment, you can pan and zoom across a high-resolution map tile and execute real-time object detection. Simply type "vehicles", "storage tanks", or "bridges" into the scan tool to see our vision-language models identifying assets from above.
 

We've optimized this demo to showcase the speed and precision of our cloud-based inference engine. While the demo area is limited, it provides a perfect look at the tool that professionals use for satellite logistics analysis and urban monitoring.
 
 

Upgrade for Full Capabilities
 

The full version of our Satellite Analysis platform (accessible via the Dashboard) unlocks global mapping, multi-layer GeoJSON exports, and custom project management features.
